founder.name: David Klein
founder.bio: First-time founder, former personal trainer. No GitHub, no funding, no network.

company.name: Fitns
company.one_liner: Adaptive strength-training plans that adjust to logged performance.

content.text: Quitting my PT job to build Fitns - training plans that actually adapt to your logged lifts, not static PDFs. No code yet, learning to build.
content.author: davidkleinbuilds

content.note: Cold-start with thin signal: a single tweet, a landing page, no prototype. Crowded consumer fitness space - potential is unproven and problem-founder fit is only moderate.
